playbook.intent: One sitting per month to all client invoices sent + all contractors paid + books reconciled.
playbook.scope: Founder issues all client invoices and pays all contractors in one batched session monthly. Output: invoices sent, contractors paid, books reconciled. Exit artifact: invoices list + contractor payment confirmations + reconciled books for the month.

success-criteria.criterion: All client invoices sent by first business day of month
All contractors paid by 5th business day
Late payers flagged with follow-up date

stage.name: Invoice clients
stage.intent: Send every invoice on the same day, no excuses.

stage.name: Pay contractors
stage.intent: Approve, batch, send. Days, not weeks.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once all contractors paid within agreed terms.

stage.name: Reconcile + log
stage.intent: Books match bank; late payers tagged.
stage.decision-gate: Required: books reconciled within 48h of batch.

extra.value: [Annual financial close - separate playbook, Tax filing - separate cadence]
[Bookkeeping + invoicing tooling live, Contractor timesheets / deliverables captured]
['Sending invoices the day each project finishes - never batch, always late', Paying contractors late to 'manage cash' - destroys bench loyalty, Skipping reconciliation - DSO drifts invisibly]
['Did I send every invoice on the same day?', 'Were contractors paid on agreed terms?', 'Did the books match the bank?']

{human: faion get-content monthly-invoice-contractor-pay-batch --format md, agent: faion get-content monthly-invoice-contractor-pay-batch --format context, json: faion get-content monthly-invoice-contractor-pay-batch --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
